fault_hypothesis: The overlap detection on line 77 uses non-strict inequalities (`<=`, `>=`), which incorrectly treats windows that touch at their boundaries as non-overlapping. The logic should use strict inequalities (`<`, `>`) to correctly identify adjacent windows as conflicts.
